escalation.rationale: Orthodox Easter ceasefire violated within hours while US-Iran talks begin in Pakistan amid continued Israeli strikes in Lebanon.

ticker_items: Ukraine reports 450+ Orthodox Easter ceasefire violations within hours
US-Iran ceasefire talks begin in Pakistan led by VP Vance
Israel continues Lebanon strikes despite regional ceasefire calls
Russia-Ukraine prisoner swap exchanges 175 soldiers each
Saudi East-West pipeline returns to full capacity after Iranian attacks

eastern_europe.description: Russian drone strikes killed at least 2 people overnight ahead of Orthodox Easter ceasefire

middle_east.description: Iranian drone struck pumping station along Saudi Arabia's 1,200km East-West oil pipeline.
Israeli air strikes killed 10 people including 3 emergency workers in southern Lebanon

ukraine.text: He sees progress toward a potential peace deal with the Kremlin, adding that a resolution to the war may not take long to achieve.
ukraine.speaker: Ukraine's top negotiator
ukraine.title: Chief negotiator

middle_east.text: Iran chose not to accept US terms, while Iran says it did not expect a deal at the first meeting.
middle_east.speaker: JD Vance
middle_east.title: US Vice President

middle_east.text: Iran has no cards except Hormuz Strait ahead of Islamabad talks
middle_east.speaker: Donald Trump
middle_east.title: US President

observers.description: Pakistan hosted failed US-Iran peace talks with Foreign Minister Ishaq Dar urging both sides to uphold the ceasefire. Pakistani officials called the negotiations a 'make or break' effort to halt Middle East fighting.

Hungary faces pivotal parliamentary election Sunday with opposition Tisza Party leading polls over Viktor Orban's Fidesz party. The election could end Orban's 16-year rule and potentially shift Hungary's foreign policy stance.

China agreed to deepen cooperation with North Korea in talks between foreign ministers on international issues. The discussions come amid broader geopolitical realignment as adversaries unite against Western coalitions.
Latvia marks 100 days on UN Security Council, keeping Ukraine war prominent on international agenda. Foreign Minister emphasizes NATO unity and 5% defense spending target at parliamentary assembly.

financial.notes: Saudi East-West pipeline restoration to full 7 million barrels/day capacity may ease energy market concerns.

update_log.text: Saudi Arabia confirms East-West oil pipeline restored to full capacity after Iranian drone attacks
Ukraine reports over 450 Orthodox Easter ceasefire violations within hours of truce beginning
US delegation led by VP Vance arrives in Pakistan for Iran ceasefire negotiations
Israeli strikes kill 10 in southern Lebanon as regional tensions persist
US-Iran peace talks end without agreement as JD Vance says Iran rejected US terms
Three oil supertankers exit Strait of Hormuz amid Iranian restrictions and fragile ceasefire
Iranian drone strikes Saudi Arabia's East-West oil pipeline pumping station
Russia-Ukraine Orthodox Easter truce begins with 32-hour temporary ceasefire
